steps.title: Use the atmosphere clue
steps.content: The passage says Mars's atmosphere is only one percent as dense as Earth's, so Martian air would not provide enough resistance for a standard helicopter's blades to keep it aloft.

steps.title: Reject unsupported causes
steps.content: Choice B says Earth helicopter blades are too large. Choice C blames gravity, which the text never mentions. Choice D blames the helicopter's overall size. The answer is A.
